title: Kaighnbot
description: An AI agent that automates tasks and integrates with external services. Built to explore the boundaries of autonomous AI tooling.

title: Housing Simulator
description: An interactive simulation modeling housing markets, zoning policies, and their downstream effects. Built for exploration and education.

title: Untitled Godot Game
description: An indie game blending Terraria's exploration, Factorio's automation, and tower defense strategy. Work in progress in Godot 4.
